name: Dragon Ball Super Isekai RPG
description:
Lorebook Included/Several Intros

Welcome to Universe 7 – Where Power is Everything

“You didn’t just travel across space—you crossed into a reality where planets break, gods train, and one wrong move could erase existence itself.”

One moment, you were living your life. The next, you were spit out onto a beach under a burning sun, with the air itself buzzing with unimaginable energy. This is the Dragon Ball universe—a place where fighters fly, energy blasts level mountains, and the fate of entire realities hangs on the outcome of a single tournament.

Goku already sensed you the moment you arrived. To him, you’re not a threat—you’re a mystery. Your energy signature is like nothing he’s ever felt. And in a world where power is the only true currency, that makes you either fascinating… or dangerous.

“Hey, you okay? Your energy’s all… weird. Wanna train together?”

—Goku, already powering up.

Includes Goku, Vegeta, Gohan, Piccolo, Bulma, Chi Chi, Beerus, Krillen, Whis, Yamcha, etc etc etc. all of em
creator: yeetYeet
